title: Root schema representing a workout structure, containing a list of sections, supersets, or exercises.

data.description: The main list of workout items, which can be a Section, Superset, or Exercise.

Section.description: A group of exercises or supersets under a named section of a workout such as Warm-up, Skill, or Main Set.

name.description: Optional name of the section such as Warm-up.

order.description: Order in which this section appears relative to others.

type.description: Fixed discriminator type for this object section.

items.description: List of exercises or supersets within this section.

Superset.description: A collection of exercises performed back to back with minimal rest.

order.description: Order in which this superset appears relative to others.

type.description: Fixed discriminator type for this object superset.

exercises.description: List of exercises included in this superset.

Exercise.description: Represents a single exercise, including tracking data and sets performed.

id.description: Unique identifier for the exercise instance.

exercise_id.description: Reference ID from the exercise library.

tracked.description: List of tracked fields for this exercise such as reps, time, or weight.

order.description: Order in which this exercise appears in a section or superset.

type.description: Fixed discriminator type for this object exercise.

sets.description: List of sets associated with this exercise.

items.description: Represents a single set of the exercise, including completion and metrics.

completed.description: Indicates whether this set has been completed.

completed_at.description: Timestamp of when the set was completed, or null if not completed.

fields.description: Holds the performance metrics for the set.

time.description: Duration in ISO 8601 format for time based exercises such as PT30S.

rest.description: Rest time IN ISO 8601 format after completing the set such as PT60s.

set_progressions.description: List of challenges and assists applied during the set such as weight, box height, lean angle or variation.

items.description: Represents a single object applied to the set.

id.description: Unique identifier for this set progression record.

set_progressions_id.description: Reference ID from the set progressions table.

value.description: Challenge or assist value which can be numeric, descriptive, or null.
